description.value: The first exchange tells you everything. The fight is already over. They just don't know it yet.

system.benefits:
The first time you make a melee attack against a creature, or a creature makes a melee attack against you, you gain a Combat Read on that creature for the remainder of the encounter. While you have a Combat Read on a creature:

  • Subtract 1 from your skill die when attacking them
  • You automatically win tiebreakers against them (if both you and the target have Combat Reading, standard tiebreaker rules apply instead)

usage.text: Passive, triggers once per target per encounter
